existing_features.title: Remove the 'Licensed & Insured' tab/badge from the Navigation bar and any trust badges section where it appears (e.g., in the About component).

Remove all occurrences of the text 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' from the page, including any section descriptions or sub-labels that reference licensing/bonding/insurance.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove the 'Licensed & Insured' tab and 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' text from the page
